name_en: Top-tier Original M13406 Black & Color✨ NANO SPEEDY Handbag】M13391 White & Color m13406 Black & Color (Three Colors - Murakami). Made from classic Monogram Jh canvas, this Nano Speedy handbag exudes ultimate femininity and is an ideal choice for carrying daily essentials. This handbag is the perfect mini version of the original Speedy, featuring exquisite stitching and being incredibly lightweight. ✨ Adjustable and detachable shoulder strap
